title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-07
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the plants and updating the metrics for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot checking on plants in a greenhouse. The robot has a clipboard or is scanning the plants (apps) to check their health.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a greenhouse.
